name: Chrome Valley Racing League
summary: A fan-made, fully simulated stock-car story league you can race in the browser.
description: A just-for-fun homage to the anthropomorphic-race-car genre: twelve original characters with personality-driven mechanics (showboats wobble while leading, big-heart racers surge on the final laps, a mentor arc lifts the rookie as the season unfolds) racing a seeded, fully simulated season across dusty ovals, canyon roads and a neon night race. The website replays the baked season and runs live in-browser race simulations — pick a venue, drop the flag, watch the story unfold. Every character, venue and result is original and simulated; not affiliated with any film studio. No real-world data, no predictions, no betting relevance — entertainment only.
datasets: Fully simulated — seeded synthetic seasons, no real-world data
